caption: A man with glasses and a tall, grey, stylized wig is seated in a studio setting. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt and a patterned bow tie, with black headphones over his ears. He is positioned behind a black microphone, facing slightly to his right. The background consists of a wall decorated with various framed photographs and a clothing rack featuring items from the brand "LEE". A white document or paper is clipped to a surface behind him. On the left side of the frame, a logo reads "THE GOSS TALK PODCAST", and on the right, a similar logo appears with the text "GOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains relatively still, maintaining his gaze and posture, with only minor shifts in his facial expression and head position as he speaks.
